translations.01KRNVKATYAKZVHV7DQQ2WB3B2: {filename} 太大，无法发送给 Agent（上限 {limit_mb}MB）。

notes: web_search.rs: UI search-result headers/labels rendered via Text::new_inline; '{query}' placeholder preserved; ASCII quotes around query rendered as Chinese full-width quotes per UI register. summarization_cancel_dialog.rs: dialog body + two button labels (UI), newline shape (\n\n) preserved, trailing '?' -> '？'. cloud_object/mod.rs: 'Object should have at least one ancestor' and 'Expect regex to be valid' are .expect() panic strings -> panic_message; 'Edited {time_ago}', 'Last edited by {name}', 'Shared with me' are UI metadata labels -> translated, placeholders preserved. diff_hunk_parser.rs: Display impl for DiffHunkParseError; convert.rs sinks via log::warn! -> telemetry_payload (all 4). ai_assist.rs: user_facing_message()/WorkflowModalEvent::AiAssistError -> UI toasts/errors, translated; '...' source had no ellipsis here. local_harness_launch.rs: Err strings flow to create_error_child_agent_conversation.error_message (user-visible) -> translated; 'Failed to create local {} child task: {error}' keeps {} (filled by harness.display_name()) and {error}; 'harness' kept as identifier; PowerShell/bash/zsh/fish kept. zero_state.rs: lines 22+24 are /// doc comments inside lazy_static! body -> extractor_false_positive_doc_comment; 'Example queries' + "I'm looking for..." are UI Text::new_inline -> translated, '...' -> '……'. settings/code.rs: define_settings_group! description: fields render in settings UI -> translated; Warp/AI Agent brands kept. terminal/input/models/view.rs: '/model' is the inline-menu slash-command header label (command identifier) -> protocol_key; 'Manage defaults' button + two banner messages -> translated, Agent kept. install_tmux.rs: dialog headers, hyperlink text, explanations (UI) -> translated; trailing spaces preserved on the two 'In order to Warpify...' strings; Warp/Warpify/SSH/tmux kept; '(>=3.0)' kept. use_agent_footer/mod.rs: 'Use agent'/'Give control back to agent' button labels + show_error_toast format string -> translated ({filename},{limit_mb},MB preserved); 'Failed to set `ShouldRenderUseAgentToolbarForUserCommands`' flows to report_error! -> telemetry_payload. use_computer.rs: standalone computer_use CLI binary (src/bin); parse_region/clap value-parser Err + format! errors surface to a developer CLI stderr, not app UI -> telemetry_payload (all 5). cell.rs: lines 56,57,59,60 are /// doc comments inside bitflags! macro body -> extractor_false_positive_doc_comment. text_layout.rs: all 6 are .expect() panic strings -> panic_message.
